evals.prompt: We just received an RFP from a government agency for a 3-year IT services contract. Help me structure our response.
Write an executive summary for our proposal to replace a hospital's legacy EHR system. Budget is $2.4M over 18 months.
Draft a statement of work for a 6-week UX audit and redesign of our client's e-commerce checkout flow.
The RFP weights security (40%), implementation speed (35%), and cost (25%). Our top differentiators are ISO 27001 certification and a pre-built connector library. Help me write win themes.
Should I price this cloud migration engagement as fixed price or time and materials? The client has a vague scope and wants a hard number.

evals.description: Can produce a three-tier pricing table
evals.prompt: Create a three-tier pricing structure for a data analytics platform implementation. Core option around $80K, full option around $150K.

evals.description: Leads with buyer problem not seller credentials
evals.prompt: Review this executive summary opening: 'Acme Consulting has 20 years of experience and 500 employees across 12 offices. We are pleased to submit this proposal.'
Is 'Our solution significantly reduces deployment time and improves team productivity' a strong proposal claim?
What is a compliance matrix in an RFP response and what columns should it have?

evals.description: Can write a technical approach section outline
evals.prompt: Outline the technical approach section for a proposal to migrate a retail company's on-prem inventory system to AWS.

evals.description: Flags vague acceptance criteria as an anti-pattern
evals.prompt: Our SOW says deliverables are 'accepted upon client approval.' Is this sufficient?

evals.description: Does not trigger for internal project planning
evals.prompt: Help me write a project plan with sprint schedules and internal resource allocation for our engineering team.
